text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----

Hi Justin,

	Can you please get in touch with me (ek@purplehat.org) to try to find
out what's happening? Hundreds of thousands of users haven't reported
anything like this... I'm sure it's an easy fix.

Regards,
Janky Jay, III

On 03/22/2012 09:50 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of security/maia,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/166333 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix 
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the
> patch and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at: 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/166333
